# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [1.0.1] - 2026-05-07

### Added

- GitHub Actions workflow for automated npm publishing on GitHub Release

## [1.0.0] - 2026-05-07

### Added

- `Game` class — core Tic Tac Toe logic with player turn management, win/draw detection, and game lifecycle
- `Board` class — internal 3×3 board state with field get/set and reset
- `savePlayerSelection(field)` — place current player's symbol on a field (1–9)
- `isFieldSelected(field)` — check if a field is already occupied
- `getBoard()` — returns the current board state as `(number | PlayerSymbol)[]`
- `currentPlayer` getter — returns the active player's symbol
- `gameStatus` getter — returns `{ status: 'running' }`, `{ status: 'win', winner }`, or `{ status: 'draw' }`
- `reset()` — resets game to initial state
- `DEFAULT_GAME_SYMBOLS` constant — default symbols `['O', 'X']`
- TypeScript types: `IGame`, `GameStatus`, `PlayerSymbol`, `PlayerSymbols`
- CLI entrypoint via `npx t3core`
- Full package exports with CommonJS + type declarations
